primary_sources.name: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
primary_sources.relevance: Covers metabolic acidosis management in CKD and mineral bone disorders

primary_sources.name: KDIGO 2017 Clinical Practice Guideline Update for the Diagnosis, Evaluation, Prevention, and Treatment of Chronic Kidney Disease-Mineral and Bone Disorder
primary_sources.relevance: Authoritative guidance on calcium, phosphorus, and magnesium disorders in CKD

primary_sources.name: Disorders of Plasma Sodium - Causes, Consequences, and Correction
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive review of hyponatremia and hypernatremia diagnosis and management

primary_sources.name: Hyperkalemia: Pathophysiology, Risk Factors and Consequences
primary_sources.relevance: Evidence-based approach to potassium disorders in nephrology practice

secondary_sources.name: Brenner and Rector's The Kidney, 11th Edition
secondary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive textbook covering pathophysiology of all electrolyte and acid-base disorders

gaps: Limited recent KDIGO guidelines specifically addressing acute electrolyte emergencies
Need for updated consensus on mixed acid-base disorder interpretation algorithms
